pub mod vyre_std
pub mod vyre_std::arith
pub fn vyre_std::arith::abs_diff_i16(a: i16, b: i16) -> u16
pub fn vyre_std::arith::abs_diff_i32(a: i32, b: i32) -> u32
pub fn vyre_std::arith::abs_diff_i64(a: i64, b: i64) -> u64
pub fn vyre_std::arith::abs_diff_i8(a: i8, b: i8) -> u8
pub fn vyre_std::arith::abs_diff_u16(a: u16, b: u16) -> u16
pub fn vyre_std::arith::abs_diff_u32(a: u32, b: u32) -> u32
pub fn vyre_std::arith::abs_diff_u64(a: u64, b: u64) -> u64
pub fn vyre_std::arith::abs_diff_u8(a: u8, b: u8) -> u8
pub fn vyre_std::arith::clamp_i16(x: i16, lo: i16, hi: i16) -> i16
pub fn vyre_std::arith::clamp_i32(x: i32, lo: i32, hi: i32) -> i32
pub fn vyre_std::arith::clamp_i64(x: i64, lo: i64, hi: i64) -> i64
pub fn vyre_std::arith::clamp_i8(x: i8, lo: i8, hi: i8) -> i8
pub fn vyre_std::arith::clamp_u16(x: u16, lo: u16, hi: u16) -> u16
pub fn vyre_std::arith::clamp_u32(x: u32, lo: u32, hi: u32) -> u32
pub fn vyre_std::arith::clamp_u64(x: u64, lo: u64, hi: u64) -> u64
pub fn vyre_std::arith::clamp_u8(x: u8, lo: u8, hi: u8) -> u8
pub fn vyre_std::arith::div_ceil_u32(numer: u32, denom: u32) -> u32
pub fn vyre_std::arith::div_ceil_u64(numer: u64, denom: u64) -> u64
pub fn vyre_std::arith::div_floor_u32(numer: u32, denom: u32) -> u32
pub fn vyre_std::arith::div_floor_u64(numer: u64, denom: u64) -> u64
pub fn vyre_std::arith::div_round_u16(numer: u16, denom: u16) -> u16
pub fn vyre_std::arith::div_round_u32(numer: u32, denom: u32) -> u32
pub fn vyre_std::arith::div_round_u64(numer: u64, denom: u64) -> u64
pub fn vyre_std::arith::div_round_u8(numer: u8, denom: u8) -> u8
pub fn vyre_std::arith::lerp_f32(a: f32, b: f32, t: f32) -> f32
pub fn vyre_std::arith::lerp_f64(a: f64, b: f64, t: f64) -> f64
pub fn vyre_std::arith::max_i16(a: i16, b: i16) -> i16
pub fn vyre_std::arith::max_i32(a: i32, b: i32) -> i32
pub fn vyre_std::arith::max_i64(a: i64, b: i64) -> i64
pub fn vyre_std::arith::max_i8(a: i8, b: i8) -> i8
pub fn vyre_std::arith::max_u16(a: u16, b: u16) -> u16
pub fn vyre_std::arith::max_u32(a: u32, b: u32) -> u32
pub fn vyre_std::arith::max_u64(a: u64, b: u64) -> u64
pub fn vyre_std::arith::max_u8(a: u8, b: u8) -> u8

pub fn vyre_std::arith::midpoint_i32(a: i32, b: i32) -> i32
pub fn vyre_std::arith::midpoint_i64(a: i64, b: i64) -> i64
pub fn vyre_std::arith::midpoint_i8(a: i8, b: i8) -> i8

pub fn vyre_std::arith::midpoint_u32(a: u32, b: u32) -> u32
pub fn vyre_std::arith::midpoint_u64(a: u64, b: u64) -> u64
pub fn vyre_std::arith::midpoint_u8(a: u8, b: u8) -> u8

pub fn vyre_std::arith::min_i32(a: i32, b: i32) -> i32
pub fn vyre_std::arith::min_i64(a: i64, b: i64) -> i64

pub fn vyre_std::arith::min_u64(a: u64, b: u64) -> u64

pub mod vyre_std::pattern
pub mod vyre_std::pattern::cache
pub fn vyre_std::pattern::cache::cache_path(patterns: &[vyre_std::pattern::dfa_assemble::Pattern<'_>], options: vyre_std::pattern::dfa_assemble::AssembleOptions) -> std::path::PathBuf
pub fn vyre_std::pattern::cache::clear() -> std::io::error::Result<()>
pub fn vyre_std::pattern::cache::load_or_compute(patterns: &[vyre_std::pattern::dfa_assemble::Pattern<'_>], options: vyre_std::pattern::dfa_assemble::AssembleOptions) -> core::result::Result<vyre_std::pattern::types::PackedDfa, vyre_std::pattern::types::PatternError>
pub fn vyre_std::pattern::cache::size() -> u64
pub mod vyre_std::pattern::dfa_assemble
pub enum vyre_std::pattern::dfa_assemble::Pattern<'a>
pub vyre_std::pattern::dfa_assemble::Pattern::Literal(&'a [u8])
pub vyre_std::pattern::dfa_assemble::Pattern::Regex(&'a str)
impl<'a> core::clone::Clone for vyre_std::pattern::dfa_assemble::Pattern<'a>
pub fn vyre_std::pattern::dfa_assemble::Pattern<'a>::clone(&self) -> vyre_std::pattern::dfa_assemble::Pattern<'a>
impl<'a> core::cmp::Eq for vyre_std::pattern::dfa_assemble::Pattern<'a>
impl<'a> core::cmp::PartialEq for vyre_std::pattern::dfa_assemble::Pattern<'a>
pub fn vyre_std::pattern::dfa_assemble::Pattern<'a>::eq(&self, other: &vyre_std::pattern::dfa_assemble::Pattern<'a>) -> bool
impl<'a> core::fmt::Debug for vyre_std::pattern::dfa_assemble::Pattern<'a>
pub fn vyre_std::pattern::dfa_assemble::Pattern<'a>::fmt(&self, f: &mut core::fmt::Formatter<'_>) -> core::fmt::Result
impl<'a> core::marker::StructuralPartialEq for vyre_std::pattern::dfa_assemble::Pattern<'a>
impl<'a> core::marker::Freeze for vyre_std::pattern::dfa_assemble::Pattern<'a>
impl<'a> core::marker::Send for vyre_std::pattern::dfa_assemble::Pattern<'a>
impl<'a> core::marker::Sync for vyre_std::pattern::dfa_assemble::Pattern<'a>

impl<'a> core::panic::unwind_safe::RefUnwindSafe for vyre_std::pattern::dfa_assemble::Pattern<'a>
impl<'a> core::panic::unwind_safe::UnwindSafe for vyre_std::pattern::dfa_assemble::Pattern<'a>

pub mod vyre_std::pattern::types

pub vyre_std::pattern::types::DfaPackFormat::EquivClass

pub struct vyre_std::pattern::types::PackedDfa

pub vyre_std::pattern::types::PackedDfa::start: u32
pub vyre_std::pattern::types::PackedDfa::state_count: u32
impl core::clone::Clone for vyre_std::pattern::types::PackedDfa
pub fn vyre_std::pattern::types::PackedDfa::clone(&self) -> vyre_std::pattern::types::PackedDfa
impl core::cmp::Eq for vyre_std::pattern::types::PackedDfa
impl core::cmp::PartialEq for vyre_std::pattern::types::PackedDfa
pub fn vyre_std::pattern::types::PackedDfa::eq(&self, other: &vyre_std::pattern::types::PackedDfa) -> bool
impl core::fmt::Debug for vyre_std::pattern::types::PackedDfa

pub const vyre_std::pattern::INVALID_STATE: u32
pub fn vyre_std::pattern::dfa_assemble(patterns: &[vyre_std::pattern::dfa_assemble::Pattern<'_>], options: vyre_std::pattern::dfa_assemble::AssembleOptions) -> core::result::Result<vyre_std::pattern::types::PackedDfa, vyre_std::pattern::types::PatternError>
pub fn vyre_std::pattern::dfa_minimize(dfa: &vyre_std::pattern::types::Dfa) -> vyre_std::pattern::types::Dfa
pub fn vyre_std::pattern::dfa_pack(dfa: &vyre_std::pattern::types::Dfa, format: vyre_std::pattern::types::DfaPackFormat) -> vyre_std::pattern::types::PackedDfa
pub fn vyre_std::pattern::dfa_unpack(packed: &vyre_std::pattern::types::PackedDfa) -> core::option::Option<vyre_std::pattern::types::Dfa>
pub fn vyre_std::pattern::nfa_to_dfa(nfa: &vyre_std::pattern::types::Nfa) -> core::result::Result<vyre_std::pattern::types::Dfa, vyre_std::pattern::types::PatternError>
pub fn vyre_std::pattern::regex_to_nfa(source: &str) -> core::result::Result<vyre_std::pattern::types::Nfa, vyre_std::pattern::types::PatternError>
pub type vyre_std::pattern::NfaStateId = u32
